channel.title: Hi, I am Sam.
channel.description: Recent content on Hi, I am Sam.

item.title: About
item.description: I am a software engineer currently working at Microsoft. You can reach me at the below places: Email: sam@{this web site} GitHub Strava Twitter

item.title: Diet Coke Reviews
item.description: Below, I review Diet Coke quality at various restaurants (primarily in the greater Seattle, WA area). Seems like a good use of everyone’s time! McDonalds, USA 🍔 🍟 The gold standard; Diet Coke in its canonical form. Seriously, there is no point in reading the rest of these reviews. Why is it so good? Feed Co., Redmond WA 🍔 TL;DR Fountain with average amount of syrup. Glasses are way too small.
